data.name: Auth_InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid credentials.

data.name: Auth_EmailAlreadyRegistered
data.value: Email already registered.

data.name: Auth_EmailNotVerified
data.value: Email not verified. Please check your inbox.

data.name: Auth_InvalidToken
data.value: Invalid or expired token.

data.name: Auth_TokenExpired
data.value: The verification link has expired. Please request a new one.

data.name: Auth_AlreadyVerified
data.value: Email is already verified.

data.name: Auth_InvalidTotpCode
data.value: Invalid authentication code.

data.name: Auth_TwoFactorAlreadyEnabled
data.value: Two-factor authentication is already enabled.

data.name: Auth_TwoFactorNotEnabled
data.value: Two-factor authentication is not enabled.

data.name: Account_NoFamilyAssociated
data.value: User does not have an associated family.

data.name: Account_DuplicateName
data.value: An account with that name already exists.

data.name: Account_NotFound
data.value: Account not found.

data.name: Transaction_CategoryNotFound
data.value: Category {0} not found.

data.name: Transaction_NotFound
data.value: Transaction {0} not found.

data.name: Family_NotFound
data.value: Family not found.

data.name: Family_InvalidInviteCode
data.value: Invalid invite code. Please check and try again.

data.name: Family_NotOwner
data.value: Only the family owner can perform this action.

data.name: Password_RequiresUppercase
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.

data.name: Password_RequiresLowercase
data.value: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.

data.name: Password_RequiresDigit
data.value: Password must contain at least one digit.

data.name: Password_RequiresSpecial
data.value: Password must contain at least one special character.

data.name: Auth_PasswordSameAsCurrent
data.value: New password must be different from the current password.

data.name: Auth_InvalidCurrentPassword
data.value: Current password is incorrect.

data.name: Auth_EmailAlreadyInUse
data.value: That email address is already in use.

data.name: Auth_PasswordMismatch
data.value: Passwords do not match.

data.name: Auth_InvalidEmailChangeToken
data.value: Invalid or already used email change link.

data.name: Auth_EmailChangeTokenExpired
data.value: The email change link has expired. Please request a new one.

data.name: ErrorUnexpected
data.value: An unexpected error occurred.
